title: COR-278: Allow Ngramx Worktree Without Ticket On Current Feature Branch
description: Allows ngramx worktree with no ticket on a feature branch by stashing changes, moving the main checkout to the integration branch, creating the worktree, and restoring the stash before startup.

test_plan.description: Worktree from current feature branch with uncommitted changes
steps: Check out a feature branch in the main repository checkout
Run ngramx worktree with no ticket argument
Confirm the main checkout is on main (or the integration branch)
Confirm a worktree exists for the feature branch and contains the stashed changes

test_plan.description: Warning when run on an integration branch
steps: Check out main in the main repository checkout
Run ngramx worktree with no ticket argument
Confirm a warning is shown and no worktree is created
